creator: alexey@ocaml.nl
text:
Started to work again... Indeed, I do have IPv6 enabled; however, it also was enabled everywhere opam update worked (including home FreeBSD machines).

I must mention that OpenSSL -- now, when it works again -- started to produce something reasonable:

❯ openssl s_client -connect opam.ocaml.org:443
CONNECTED(00000004)
depth=2 C = US, O = Internet Security Research Group, CN = ISRG Root X1
verify return:1
depth=1 C = US, O = Let's Encrypt, CN = R3
verify return:1
depth=0 CN = opam.ocaml.org
verify return:1
